content:
$REPO_ROOT/$ORG_ID/os-foundation
$REPO_ROOT/$ORG_ID/worlds
$REPO_ROOT/$ORG_ID/tools
$REPO_ROOT/$ORG_ID/docs

os-foundation holds implementation of the OS specifications: scripts, libraries, and automation configurations.
worlds contains world-specific assets that require version control (for example, game logic, narrative scripts, datasets).
tools holds reusable utilities or command-line tools that interact with $ARCHIVE_ROOT and $PROMPT_ROOT.
docs contains human-facing documentation and published narrative outputs.

Branch model:

main – stable, handoff-safe state, aligned with the latest accepted specs.
dev – active integration branch where new features are merged and tested.
feature/{world-id}-{short-description} – short-lived branches for specific enhancements.

Pull requests must reference one or more archive IDs from $ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta or $ARCHIVE_ROOT/specs so that every change has a traceable narrative and decision record.

2.6 $AUTOMATION_ENGINE
